entities.name: The target of constraint matters more than intensity

entities.name: Masterpiece is result of dissolution process
entities.context: The masterpiece is often the RESULT of the dissolution process, not something that happens despite it

entities.name: Creative pressure requires tension
entities.context: Creative pressure REQUIRES tension — it forces integration of conflicting visions
